## Summary

## Related issue

<!-- Example: Closes #123 -->

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

<!-- List the commands you ran and the result. -->

```text
Paste validation commands and outcomes here.
```

## User-facing impact

<!-- Optional, but recommended when behavior, docs, or outputs changed. -->

- [ ] No user-facing change
- [ ] Action behavior changed
- [ ] Docs/examples changed
- [ ] Summary/report/comment wording changed

## Action output changes

<!-- Optional, but helpful when summary text, sticky comments, or failure wording changed. -->

```text
Paste a sample summary, report excerpt, or PR comment snippet here.
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR focused on one topic.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated `README.md`, `action.yml`, or related docs when public behavior changed.
- [ ] I rebuilt and committed `dist/` artifacts for runtime code changes.
- [ ] I linked the related issue or explained why there is not one.
- [ ] I called out any follow-up work or known limitations.
- [ ] I read and followed the repository Code of Conduct.
